assignments.twist: coupled Dyson-Brownian-motion SDEs for density-matrix eigenvalues with multiplicative noise and eigenvalue-repulsion drift
corresponding forward equation for the eigenvalue distribution, with a Coulomb-gas/log-interaction potential

core_model_summary: Monitored quantum dynamics reduced to stochastic differential equations for the density-matrix eigenvalues (a Dyson Brownian motion with drift plus multiplicative noise) together with the associated Fokker-Planck equation for their probability distribution.
